'''Ollender''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] [[Kraken (Assassin-class)|''Kraken'']], which had been assigned to the [[Corrupter Task Force|''Corrupter'' Task Force]] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
